steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student must identify which of the three foods has the highest magnesium content. This goal is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choice
steps.content:
B directly identifies chia seeds as having the highest magnesium content—150 mg/oz, explicitly stated as more than both peanuts and almonds.

The other three either compare only partial sets of foods, omit the numerical comparisons needed, or introduce irrelevant information.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
